relations.evidence: With SEPA Direct Debit (SDD), customers sign a mandate that authorizes you to collect future payments from their bank accounts. You can record customer mandates in Odoo
SEPA (Single Euro Payments Area) is a payment-integration initiative of the European Union... With SEPA Direct Debit (SDD)
You can record customer mandates in Odoo and generate XML files listing payments to be collected with the mandates
With SEPA Direct Debit (SDD), customers sign a mandate that authorizes you to collect future payments
SEPA (Single Euro Payments Area) is a payment-integration initiative of the European Union
SEPA is supported by all SEPA countries
Uploading these files to your bank instructs them to collect these payments from your customers
